Package org.eventb.internal.ui.prover

Class HypothesisPage

java.lang.Object
org.eclipse.ui.part.Page
org.eventb.internal.ui.prover.HypothesisPage
All Implemented Interfaces:
org.eclipse.ui.part.IPage, org.eclipse.ui.part.IPageBookViewPage, IUserSupportManagerChangedListener, IHypothesisPage
Direct Known Subclasses:
CacheHypothesisPage, SearchHypothesisPage
public abstract class HypothesisPage extends org.eclipse.ui.part.Page implements IHypothesisPage, IUserSupportManagerChangedListener

  • Constructor Details

    • HypothesisPage

      public HypothesisPage(IUserSupport userSupport, ProverUI proverUI)
      Constructor.

      Parameters:
      userSupport - the User Support associated with this hypothesis page. This must not be null.
      proverUI - the main prover editor (ProverUI). This must not be null.

  • Method Details

    • getHypypothesisCompsite

      public abstract HypothesisComposite getHypypothesisCompsite()
      Abstract method for creating the main hypothesis composite to be used for this hypothesis page. Client needs to implement this method to provide the appropriate hypothesis composite of their choice.
      Returns:
      a hypothesis composite.

    • userSupportManagerChanged

      public void userSupportManagerChanged(IUserSupportManagerDelta delta)
      Description copied from interface: IUserSupportManagerChangedListener
      Notifies that one or more user supports have changed. The specific details of the change are described by the given delta.
      Specified by:
      userSupportManagerChanged in interface IUserSupportManagerChangedListener
      Parameters:
      delta - the delta describes the changes.
